nasb.text: The sleep of the working man is pleasant, whether he eats little or much; but the full stomach of the rich man does not allow him to sleep.

esv.text: Sweet is the sleep of a laborer, whether he eats little or much, but the full stomach of the rich will not let him sleep.

cnv.text: 勞力的人無論吃多吃少，都睡得甜；財主的豐足，卻不容他安睡。

ccb.text: 劳力的人不管吃多吃少，总是睡得香甜；富人的万贯家财却害得他不能成眠。

csbs.text: 劳力的人无论吃多吃少，都睡得甜美；富有人的丰足，却不容他安睡。
